title: Visualizing Autocorrelation Properties of Stationary Models
description: A graph showing the theoretical Autocorrelation Function (ACF) for common stationary ARIMA models, demonstrating how correlation decays over time lags.
relationships: AR(1) model shows exponential decay of autocorrelation
MA(1) model shows a single significant spike at lag 1
All correlations fall within the confidence band for lags where no significant correlation exists
